/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/bitboard/bitboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/board.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/eval-helpers.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/evaluate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/interface/interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/moveGen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/zobrist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/tests/tests.cpp.o -o main
